code: @Manual{,   title = {preflightnma: Preflight Diagnostics for Network Meta-Analysis},   author = {Nathan Green},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.1},   url = {https://n8thangreen.github.io/preflightnma}, }

title: Preflight Diagnostics for Network Meta-Analysis
text: Preflight checks network meta-analysis.

title: Preflight Diagnostics for Network Meta-Analysis
text: significant gap literature regarding practical, visualization-heavy workflows analysts. existing literature focuses theoretical requirements feasibility (e.g., assessing transitivity, similarity, consistency) rather applied data science visualization pipeline needed make assessments.

what: Why this is a good idea
title: Preflight Diagnostics for Network Meta-Analysis
text: “Gap” Methodology: Many researchers struggle translate high-level feasibility guidelines actual code visualizations. Transparency Reproducibility: increasing demand open-science practices HTA. systematically interrogate data committing full NMA (justify one performed) highly useful community. Utility Practitioners: Junior researchers statisticians often lack “blueprint” stage. provide structured workflow (e.g., “Step 1: Network Graph Visualization,” “Step 2: Baseline Risk Distribution Plotting,” “Step 3: Effect Modifier Exploration”).

title: Preflight Diagnostics for Network Meta-Analysis
text: workflow : Visualizing connectivity: Basic network plots, emphasizing handle disconnected networks multi-arm trials. Visualizing potential modifiers: Scatter plots “strip charts” patient/study characteristics across treatment arms. Visualizing consistency/heterogeneity: Funnel plots, forest plots pairwise vs. network estimates, “league table heatmaps” flag potential issues.

title: Build Connectivity Network Plot — build_network
text: Construct render network diagram treatment comparisons. Node sizes represent total sample size, edge thicknesses/opacities represent number studies comparing treatments.

title: Build Connectivity Network Plot — build_network
code: build_network(   data,   grouping_var = "treatment",   study_var = "study",   sample_size_var = "sample_size",   title_text = "",   show_study_names = TRUE,   max_N = NULL,   max_studies = NULL )

title: Build Connectivity Network Plot — build_network
text: data data frame containing study-level arm data. grouping_var Column name treatments (e.g., "treatment"). study_var Column name study IDs (e.g., "study"). sample_size_var Column name sample size (e.g., "sample_size"). title_text Title plot. show_study_names Logical; TRUE, study identifiers listed next nodes. max_N Optional numeric value cap/standardize node size scale across multiple plots. max_studies Optional numeric value cap/standardize edge width scale across multiple plots.

title: Build Connectivity Network Plot — build_network
text: ggraph/ggplot object representing network plot.

what: Extract data frame from an nma_data object — extract_network_data
title: Extract data frame from an nma_data object — extract_network_data
text: Helper function extract tidy data frame multinma network object. handles mapping internal .study, .trt, .n, etc. variables clean names consolidates IPD /AgD data.

title: Extract data frame from an nma_data object — extract_network_data
Extract data frame from an nma_data object — extract_network_data
text: network network object class nma_data (multinma) list.

title: Extract data frame from an nma_data object — extract_network_data
text: data.frame containing network data standardized names.

what: Run Preflight Diagnostics on an NMA Network — nma_preflight
title: Run Preflight Diagnostics on an NMA Network — nma_preflight
text: Orchestrates preflight checks network data structure: connectivity, transitivity (baseline covariate balance), sparsity, covariate modifier checks.

title: Run Preflight Diagnostics on an NMA Network — nma_preflight
code: nma_preflight(   network,   covariates = NULL,   time_var = NULL,   tx_duration_var = NULL,   trt_var = "treatment",   study_var = "study",   sample_size_var = "sample_size",   trt_combo_var = NULL,   timeline_facet_var = NULL,   reference_trt = NULL,   ... )

title: Run Preflight Diagnostics on an NMA Network — nma_preflight
text: network nma_data object list. covariates Optional character vector covariate names assess balance. time_var Optional column name timepoint/follow-week (e.g. "timepoint_wk"). tx_duration_var Optional column name treatment duration (e.g. "val_tx_duration"). trt_var Column name treatments (default: "treatment"). study_var Column name studies (default: "study"). sample_size_var Column name sample sizes (default: "sample_size"). trt_combo_var Optional column name alternative treatment groupings. timeline_facet_var Optional column name facet timeline plot . reference_trt Optional name reference treatment. ... Additional arguments passed plotting functions.

title: Run Preflight Diagnostics on an NMA Network — nma_preflight
text: object class nma_preflight containing sparsity, connectivity plots, transitivity plots, covariate modifier plots.

what: Generate Quarto Report for NMA Preflight Diagnostics — nma_preflight_report
title: Generate Quarto Report for NMA Preflight Diagnostics — nma_preflight_report
text: Generates comprehensive Quarto HTML report containing preflight diagnostic outputs: network sparsity, connectivity, transitivity, covariate modifier checks.

title: Generate Quarto Report for NMA Preflight Diagnostics — nma_preflight_report
code: nma_preflight_report(   preflight,   output_file = "preflight_report.html",   title = "NMA Preflight Diagnostics Report",   author = NULL,   browse = TRUE,   ... )

title: Generate Quarto Report for NMA Preflight Diagnostics — nma_preflight_report
text: preflight nma_preflight object generated nma_preflight(), nma_data network object (case nma_preflight() run first). output_file Character; path/filename output report (default: "preflight_report.html"). title Character; title report (default: "NMA Preflight Diagnostics Report"). author Character; author report. browse Logical; TRUE (default), opens generated report default web browser. ... Additional arguments passed nma_preflight() network object provided.

title: Generate Quarto Report for NMA Preflight Diagnostics — nma_preflight_report
text: path generated report file (invisibly).

title: Plot Covariate Bubble (Exploratory Meta-Regression) — plot_covariate_bubble
text: Bubble plot outcome rate/proportion vs baseline covariate, weighted sample size.

title: Plot Covariate Bubble (Exploratory Meta-Regression) — plot_covariate_bubble
code: plot_covariate_bubble(   data,   covariate,   covariate_label = covariate,   trt_var = "treatment",   outcome_var = NULL,   outcome_label = "Outcome Rate",   time_var = NULL,   title_text = NULL )

title: Plot Covariate Bubble (Exploratory Meta-Regression) — plot_covariate_bubble
text: data data frame. covariate Character; covariate column name. covariate_label Character; label covariate axis. trt_var Character; treatment column name. outcome_var Character; outcome column name. NULL, calculated events / sample_size. outcome_label Character; outcome label y-axis. time_var Character; timepoint column name. title_text Character; title plot.

title: Plot Covariate Bubble (Exploratory Meta-Regression) — plot_covariate_bubble
text: ggplot object.

title: Plot Stratified Forest Plot — plot_stratified_forest
text: Generates forest plot treatment contrasts (e.g. Risk Differences) stratified baseline covariate categories.

title: Plot Stratified Forest Plot — plot_stratified_forest
code: plot_stratified_forest(   data,   covariate,   effect_col = "risk_difference",   lower_ci = "ci_lower",   upper_ci = "ci_upper",   study_col = "study",   trt_col = "treatment",   time_col = NULL,   breaks = NULL,   labels = NULL )

title: Plot Stratified Forest Plot — plot_stratified_forest
text: data data frame. covariate Character; baseline covariate column. effect_col Column treatment effects (default: "risk_difference"). lower_ci Column lower CI. upper_ci Column upper CI. study_col Column study names. trt_col Column treatments. time_col Column timepoints. breaks Optional numeric breaks categorize covariate. labels Optional labels breaks.

title: Plot Stratified Forest Plot — plot_stratified_forest
text: ggplot object.

title: Plot Study Timeline — plot_study_timeline
text: data data frame. study_var Column name study IDs. trt_var Column name treatments. tx_duration_var Column name treatment duration. followup_var Column name total follow-time. facet_var Optional column name facet timeline plot .

title: Plot Study Timeline — plot_study_timeline
text: ggplot object.

title: Generate Network Connectivity Diagnostics — preflight_connectivity
text: Entry point generating connectivity network plots across timepoints /specific timepoints.

title: Generate Network Connectivity Diagnostics — preflight_connectivity
code: preflight_connectivity(   network,   trt_var = "treatment",   trt_combo_var = NULL,   study_var = "study",   sample_size_var = "sample_size",   show_study_names = TRUE,   time_var = NULL )

title: Generate Network Connectivity Diagnostics — preflight_connectivity
text: network nma_data object list/data.frame containing network data. trt_var Column name treatments (default: "treatment"). trt_combo_var Optional column name alternative treatment groupings (e.g. classes). study_var Column name study IDs (default: "study"). sample_size_var Column name sample size (default: "sample_size"). show_study_names Logical; TRUE, study names plotted. time_var Optional column name study follow-time (e.g. "timepoint_wk").

title: Generate Network Connectivity Diagnostics — preflight_connectivity
text: list containing network diagnostic plots.

Additional arguments.

title: Check Network Transitivity and Baseline Covariate Balance — preflight_transitivity
text: Generates baseline risk patient characteristic balance plots across treatment groups visually assess assumption transitivity (similarity data sources).

title: Check Network Transitivity and Baseline Covariate Balance — preflight_transitivity
text: network nma_data object list. covariates Character vector covariate column names check. NULL, auto-detects numeric columns part standard NMA structure. trt_var Column name treatments (default: "treatment"). study_var Column name studies (default: "study"). facet_var Optional column name facet plots (e.g., "outcome_name").

title: Check Network Transitivity and Baseline Covariate Balance — preflight_transitivity
text: list ggplot objects (one per covariate).
